info.title: IdentityService API
info.description: Authentication, User Management, Tenant Management, and API Key Management

get.summary: Get list of users for a tenant
Get a tenant's public business profile
get.description: Returns business profile data for public menu display. Supports ETag/If-None-Match for conditional requests.
Returns the full theme configuration for a tenant. Returns defaults if no custom theme is set. Supports ETag/If-None-Match for conditional requests.

put.description: Updates the full theme configuration for a tenant. SuperUsers can update any tenant; admins can only update their own tenant.

get.description: Returns a list of built-in theme presets that can be applied to a tenant.

post.summary: Sync tenant authentication configuration from OnlineMenuSaaS

delete.summary: Cancel a pending or confirmed account deletion request

post.summary: Confirm account deletion via email token

get.summary: Download a completed data export as a ZIP file via presigned URL redirect
Get consent preferences for the authenticated user

put.summary: Update consent preferences for the authenticated user

get.summary: Get the status of a data export request

post.summary: Request account deletion with email confirmation
Request a GDPR data export for the authenticated user

get.summary: Get the authenticated tenant's business profile

put.summary: Update the authenticated tenant's business profile

get.summary: List the authenticated user's active sessions

delete.summary: Revoke a specific session for the authenticated user

get.summary: Get aggregated health status of all platform services
get.description: Polls health endpoints of all services and returns unified status. Results cached for 10 seconds.
